title: Validation of an EHR-based machine learning model for gastrointestinal bleeding
source: Validation of an electronic health record-based machine learning model compared with clinical risk scores for gastrointestinal bleeding. The machine learning model achieved an AUC of 0.92 (95% CI, 0.90–0.95), higher than the Glasgow-Blatchford Score (GBS) (AUC 0.89; 95% CI, 0.87–0.92). Calibration was good: the Brier score was 0.10 for the machine learning model compared with 0.13 for GBS and 0.13 for the Oakland Score.
